title: Phase 10: Documentation & Packaging

title: Finalize gemspec metadata

description: Fresh clone, bundle install, bin/storyfix --help

title: Document CSAM handling limitation
description: Add note in README about LLM refusal behavior and --in-place risk

description: .github/workflows/test.yml - run specs on push/PR

description: On first database access, create directory and run migrations if needed

title: Phase 0: Pre-Implementation
description: Update PRD and verify OpenRouter model strings before coding begins

title: Update PRD: Ruby 3.3, fix storyfix command syntax
description: Change Ruby version from 4.x to 3.3. Change line 27 from 'storyfix-<command>' to 'storyfix <command>'. Add extralite to Dependencies section.

title: Verify OpenRouter model strings
description: Research current OpenRouter model identifiers for Claude, GPT-4, Gemini, DeepSeek, Grok, Perplexity. Document in default seeds.

title: Phase 1: Project Scaffolding

description: Create: lib/storyfix/, lib/storyfix.rb, bin/storyfix, spec/, spec/spec_helper.rb

description: Add .rspec file with format documentation, color, and require spec_helper options

title: Create Gemfile
description: ruby ~> 3.3, gemspec, dev deps: rspec, simplecov, webmock

title: Create storyfix.gemspec
description: Name: storyfix, dependencies: optimist, colorize, extralite

title: Create lib/storyfix/version.rb
description: VERSION = '0.1.0'

title: Create lib/storyfix.rb
description: Main require file, module namespace, require all submodules

description: Shebang, require storyfix, call Storyfix::CLI.run(ARGV)

description: SimpleCov with minimum_coverage 100, require storyfix

title: Create Rakefile
description: Default task: spec

title: Verify scaffold setup
description: bundle install succeeds, bundle exec rspec runs empty suite

title: Test issue
description: Test description

title: Phase 6: API Client
description: Implement OpenRouter HTTP client with error handling

title: Create lib/storyfix/errors.rb
description: StoryfixError base, MissingApiKeyError, ApiError (status, body), EmptyResponseError, TimeoutError

title: Create lib/storyfix/api_client.rb
description: ENDPOINT constant, initialize(api_key, model, timeout), call(system_prompt, user_content)

title: Implement request construction
description: POST to OpenRouter, Authorization header, JSON body with model and messages array

title: Implement response parsing
description: Extract choices[0].message.content from JSON response

title: Implement timeout handling
description: Set read_timeout on Net::HTTP, raise TimeoutError with retry suggestion

title: Implement HTTP error handling
description: 4xx/5xx responses raise ApiError with status and body

title: Implement empty response detection
description: Raise EmptyResponseError if choices empty or content blank

title: Write api_client_spec.rb
description: Use webmock, test success case and all error conditions

title: Write errors_spec.rb
description: Test error class hierarchy and attributes

title: Phase 5: CLI Framework

description: RESERVED_COMMANDS constant, run(argv), parse_options (Optimist), route_command

title: Implement Optimist argument parsing
description: Banner, options (model, model_name, in_place, input, output, debug, verbose), conflicts

title: Implement no-args help behavior
description: storyfix without args shows help (same as --help)

title: Implement --version
description: Print version and exit

title: Create lib/storyfix/io_handler.rb
description: read_input(opts) from stdin or file, write_output(opts, content) to stdout/file/in-place, validate_input!

title: Implement --in-place safety checks
description: Conflict with stdin (require --input). Require file exists. Refuse if input is empty.

title: Implement command routing
description: Route to fix execution or management commands based on first positional arg

title: Write cli_spec.rb
description: Test argument parsing, option conflicts, command routing, help output

title: Write io_handler_spec.rb
description: Test stdin/file input, stdout/file/in-place output, validation

title: Phase 4: Fixes
description: Implement fix CRUD, argument interpolation, and reserved name validation

title: Create lib/storyfix/fix.rb
description: find(name), all, create(name, desc, body), delete(name). Instance: name, description, body, render(args)

title: Implement argument interpolation
description: Replace {{1}}, {{2}}, etc. with positional args. Error if missing args. Error if extra args.

title: Implement reserved name validation
description: RESERVED_NAMES constant. Reject fix creation with reserved names (list, add, remove, show, etc.)

title: Implement list command
description: Print all fixes (name, description)

title: Implement add command
description: Create fix with name, description, body. Validate name not reserved.

title: Implement show command
description: Print fix details (name, description, body)

title: Implement remove command
description: Delete fix by name

title: Write fix_spec.rb
description: Test CRUD, interpolation with 0/1/2/3 args, reserved name rejection, missing fix handling, missing/extra arg errors

title: Phase 8: Output Formatting
description: Implement colorized output and standardized error messages

title: Create lib/storyfix/output.rb
description: error(msg) red stderr, warn(msg) yellow stderr, info(msg) cyan stderr, debug(msg) dim stderr, success(msg) green stderr

title: Standardize error message format
description: Consistent format: storyfix: error: <message>. Actionable suggestions where applicable.

title: Implement exit codes
description: 0=success, 1=usage/general, 2=API error, 3=config error. Apply throughout codebase.

title: Write output_spec.rb
description: Test colorized output methods, stderr routing
